Remove the entire Wine prefix for "{0}"?

This cannot be undone.

auto_update.warning_text: Arch Linux is not designed for fully automatic updates. Kernel updates require a reboot. AUR packages may fail to build without user interaction. Some updates require manual steps (conffiles, DB schemas, etc.). Only enable this if you understand the risks and regularly check your system.
auto_update.auto_install_hint: Runs pacman -Syu on schedule via a systemd user timer. Requires an active polkit agent (Plasma provides one automatically).
